title: Lightmap Encoding — RGBM, RGBE, L1 SH
description: Covers HDR encoding formats for baked indirect light: RGBM (scale packed in alpha, used in earlier UE versions), RGBE (Radiance HDR, Ward 1991), and L1 Spherical Harmonics (two textures storing 6 SH coefficients for directional irradiance). The choice of encoding format determines the dynamic range, directionality, and memory cost of baked lighting; L1 SH enables directional baked light that correctly responds to normal mapping. Students will implement all three encoding formats, decode them in a pixel shader, compare their visual quality under varied normal maps, and measure their VRAM footprint for a test level.
